title: Funnasting Metallic Marker Pens, Set of 10 Assorted Colours Painting Pens Art Pens, Scrapbook Accessories, Card Making, DIY Photo Album, Plastic, Glass, Metal, Stone, Clothes and Pottery
features: [ Wide Applications ] Metallic paint pens can be widely used on any surface like black card, paper, plastic, glass, stone, ceramics, metal, wood, paper crafting supplies etc. A wonderful choose for card marking, DIY photo albums, scrapbook, wedding craft, adult coloring books

[ Vibrant Glitter Metallic Pens ] Comes with 10 vibrant metallic colors, including Gold, Silver, Black, White, Brown, Green, Olive, Blue, Purple, Pink ( Red ), These colorful markers are vivid, shiny and adds sparkle embellishment to various craft work

[ Premium Quality ] Metallic art pens are made of water-based metallic ink. The ink contains finely ground particles, acid-free, non-toxic. Medium point metallic markers feature with 2 mm tip which is firm, smooth and flows very well, perfect for writing on black paper, scrapbook and album
[ Great Gift Idea ] High-quality paper boxes and interesting patterns It’s a great gift for Christmas, Birthday, Mother's Day, Easter Day, Valentine's Day, Thanks giving Day, New Year's gift
